action.reasoning: Observation: torch_scatter segfaults with torch 2.11. I need to bypass torch_geometric/torch_scatter entirely. Analysis: I'll write a pure PyTorch GNN using scatter_add_ (built-in to torch via index_add_). This avoids all compiled extensions. Decision: Write custom GIN with virtual node using pure torch ops, custom batching, and test it.
